sizing_rule.note: Use dynamic fractional f (e.g., 0.1–0.2 of full optimal f) adjusted on trade-by-trade basis instead of daily basis. Apply when equation 2.09c (compounding advantage) < equation 2.09b (trade-by-trade variance). Geometric mean calculated per trade rather than per day yields faster portfolio doubling.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f trading instead of static fractional f to achieve faster portfolio doubling times, as dynamic fractional f benefits portfolios when the compounding advantage (2.09c) is less than the trade-by-trade variance (2.09b).
